id.description: Unique task identifier (e.g. date-seq or UUID)

title.description: Short human-readable title of the task

description.description: Detailed description of what should be done

labels.description: Optional tags (e.g. frontend, backend, openclaw, analytics)

contextFiles.description: Paths to docs or code files the executor should read first

repoPath.description: Filesystem path to the git repo root for this task

steps.description: Ordered list of concrete steps the builder agent / code assistant should perform

instruction.description: Natural-language instruction describing exactly what to do

targetFiles.description: Files this step is expected to touch or create

commands.description: Shell commands to run for this step (tests, build, lint)
